brand.taglineShort: The right kitchen gear lasts 30 years. Buy it once.

methodology: Every item purchased at retail and used for 30+ days of regular cooking — no staged one-time tests.
Cookware tested across multiple heat sources (gas, electric, induction where applicable) and multiple food types.
Knife sharpness tested on tomatoes and paper at day 1 and day 90 to measure edge retention.
We note actual assembly time, seasoning time, and first-use quirks that manufacturers omit from listings.
Price-per-quality cliff named for every category — we'll tell you when the $40 pan genuinely beats the $200 one.
Affiliate links go to the lowest legitimate price regardless of commission rate.

newsletter.title: The KitchenWise weekly
newsletter.subtitle: Practical picks and straight answers from KitchenWise, once a week. No spam.

defaultMetaDescription: Cast iron, carbon steel, chef's knives, stand mixers, air fryers — we cook with everything we recommend and skip the ones that disappoint in daily use. No affiliate-first recommendations. No gifted pr

homepage.h1: The right kitchen gear lasts 30 years. Buy it once.
homepage.subhead: Cast iron, carbon steel, chef's knives, stand mixers, air fryers — we cook with everything we recommend and skip the ones that disappoint in daily use. No affiliate-first recommendations. No gifted products.
homepage.trustLine: Bought at retail. Cooked with daily. Returned if it disappointed us.

about.headline: Why KitchenWise exists
about.body: Most kitchen gear sites are funded by the brands they cover. We're funded by affiliate commissions, which means we make more when you buy — but only if you stay satisfied enough to trust us again. That keeps us honest. We test everything at home, in a real kitchen, cooking real meals.
